focus: Verify the system-spec-kit tooling-borrow is load-bearing
noveltyJustification: Connected the phase plan to the live package and vitest config paths that will break after nesting if not repaired.
keyQuestions: Is the system-spec-kit tooling-borrow accounted for?
answeredQuestions: The tooling-borrow is correctly scoped into 002 and includes both runtime and system-spec-kit sides.

keyFindings.title: The tooling-borrow gates runtime typecheck and council tests
